summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29 morning: Mostly cloudy, 9°C, light breeze)
summary.market: Global markets saw volatility in late March due to geopolitical tensions and AI disruption fears. Energy (+9.54%) and Utilities (+10.36%) outperformed, while Technology/AI-related sectors faced correction. Bond markets strengthened.
summary.art: Global art market showing cautious optimism with a 4% growth in 2025. Strong demand for established artists and quality provenance. U.S. continues to lead with 44% of global sales.
